title: Engine ID and Context
text:
[REQ-0055] The agent MUST accept a configurable `snmpEngineID` at construction time.

[REQ-0056] The agent MUST support only the default context (empty `contextName`).

[REQ-0057] The agent MUST silently discard any scoped PDU whose `contextEngineID` does not match the agent's configured `snmpEngineID`.

[REQ-0058] The agent MUST silently discard any scoped PDU whose `contextName` is not the empty string.
[REQ-0059] The agent SHOULD additionally respond with a Report PDU incrementing `snmpUnknownContexts` as specified in RFC 3412.

**Rationale:**
SNMPv3 requires an authoritative engine ID to identify the agent. Supporting only the default context keeps the scope simple while remaining compliant for single-context deployments. Silent discard is the safe minimum-viable response to mismatched context fields; the SHOULD for a Report PDU allows a conformant implementation later without mandating it now.
